creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Looks good, but has wrong plist when built WITH_GNOME 
(http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/plplot-gnome-5.8.0.log) and doesn't 
build WITH_PYTHON 
(http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/plplot-python-5.8.0.log). Can those 
be fixed along with the update?
